name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.69: adds the Receipts tab to the operator UI (public/index.html) for the receipt-to-cost feature. New Receipts nav page: upload a supplier photo/PDF, which is downscaled client-side and sent to /api/v1/receipts/extract; the extracted lines render in a review table showing per-single-unit net cost (editable), auto-matches, candidate product buttons plus catalog search for unmatched lines, skip, and a cost-check verdict (confident/suggest/mismatch) per line. Confirm is blocked until every line is matched or skipped; confirming writes net costs and learns description aliases. Includes a recent-receipts history list. listReceipts now returns lineCount. Backend receipt logic unchanged from v5.68 (extract/confirm, learned aliases, size-aware matching, costPriceNetIsk, net-preferring profit report). Cumulative.
